title: ETL & Data Ingestion
description: The ETL module supports the extraction, transformation, and loading of clinical data into the OMOP Common Data Model. It includes tools for schema mapping, concept mapping, FHIR ingestion, source profiling, and job monitoring to streamline the conversion of raw source data into analysis-ready CDM datasets.
tips: Complete schema mapping before concept mapping to establish structural alignment between source tables and CDM domains.
Use the Source Profiler to understand source data distributions and identify edge cases prior to writing transformation logic.
Leverage FHIR Ingestion workflows where source systems expose FHIR APIs to accelerate onboarding without custom ETL development.
Validate concept mapping coverage using the Vocabulary Browser to ensure source codes are correctly mapped to standard concepts.
Monitor ETL jobs through the Jobs Monitoring panel and configure alerts to catch failures before they affect downstream analyses.
